message:
fix(br-83fa): add --release to perf baseline + fix blake3::Hash Ord

Two fixes:
1. scripts/run_perf_baseline_matrix.py: Add --release flag to cargo run
   command. Debug builds were 54x slower (p95: 51194ms → 949ms).

2. crates/fnx-cgse/src/lib.rs: Fix DeterministicHash sort by converting
   blake3::Hash to bytes array since Hash doesn't implement Ord.

Closes franken_networkx-83fa [E1.1]

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -109,7 +109,7 @@ def build_command(
 ) -> str:
     parts = [
         f"CARGO_TARGET_DIR={target_dir}",
-        f"{cargo_wrapper} run -q -p fnx-algorithms --example bfs_baseline --",
+        f"{cargo_wrapper} run --release -q -p fnx-algorithms --example bfs_baseline --",
         f"--topology {scenario['topology']}",
         f"--seed {scenario['seed']}",
     ]
